entities.name: ARACHIS
entities.description: Genus of plants including groundnut, naturally occurring in five South American countries

entities.name: ARGENTINA
entities.description: Country where the genus Arachis occurs naturally and where cultivated groundnut originated

entities.name: BOLIVIA
entities.description: Country where the genus Arachis occurs naturally and where cultivated groundnut originated

entities.name: BRAZIL
entities.description: Country where the genus Arachis occurs naturally

entities.name: PARAGUAY
entities.description: Country where the genus Arachis occurs naturally

entities.name: URUGUAY
entities.description: Country where the genus Arachis occurs naturally

entities.name: MATO GROSSO
entities.description: Region in the headwaters of the Paraguay river considered the center of origin of the genus Arachis

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: Cultivated species Arachis hypogaea L. originating in southern Bolivia and northwestern Argentina

entities.name: SOUTH AMERICA
entities.description: Continent where the genus Arachis, cultivated groundnut, and groundnut rust originated

entities.name: ANDES
entities.description: Mountain range whose eastern slopes are the origin area of cultivated groundnut

entities.name: GROUNDNUT RUST
entities.description: Major disease of groundnut caused by the fungus Puccinia arachidis Speg.

entities.name: PUCCINIA ARACHIDIS SPEG.
entities.description: Fungal pathogen that causes groundnut rust

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International center where rust-resistant groundnut accessions were identified

entities.name: RIBBED VALENCIA TYPE
entities.description: A specific type of cultivated groundnut identified as rust-resistant

entities.name: PERU
entities.description: Country where rust-resistant ribbed Valencia type groundnuts originated

entities.name: RUST RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut or wild Arachis species to resist infection by groundnut rust

entities.name: GENE POOL
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available for groundnut improvement, which can be enriched by collections from Peru

entities.name: WILD ARACHIS SPECIES
entities.description: Non-cultivated species of the genus Arachis that can be resistant or immune to rust

relationships.description: can be resistant or immune to rust
